mapper.select: SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name, u2.real_name as creator_name FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room r ON a.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON a.created_by = u2.id ORDER BY a.check_in_date DESC

SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name, u2.real_name as creator_name FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room r ON a.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON a.created_by = u2.id ORDER BY a.check_in_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name, u2.real_name as creator_name FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room r ON a.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON a.created_by = u2.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM assignment WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY check_in_date DESC

SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE a.room_id = #{roomId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY a.bed_number

SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name FROM assignment a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room r ON a.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE r.building_id = #{buildingId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.room_number, a.bed_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assignment (student_id, room_id, bed_number, check_in_date, status, created_by) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{roomId}, #{bedNumber}, #{checkInDate}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM assignment WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY check_in_date DESC LIMIT 1
